description: Interactive, data-driven views of Hyperkit hypergrid quality, cost, latency, search flow, ranking, and uncertainty.

panels.description: Cost versus resolution rate. Bubble area tracks completed shards; color tracks topology. Zoom, restore, and data-view controls support interactive exploration.
panels.title: Quality / Cost Bubble Explorer

panels.description: Each polyline is one cell across normalized quality, cost, latency, uplift, progress, and panel-size dimensions.
panels.title: Cell Trade-space Parallel Coordinates

panels.description: Mean resolution rate for each topology and K combination; the color domain follows the filtered data.
panels.title: Topology × K Resolution Heatmap

panels.description: Completed shard volume flowing from search generation through topology into individual cells.
panels.title: Generation → Topology → Cell Flow

panels.description: Live ordering by resolution rate; dashboard refreshes animate rank changes.
panels.title: Live Cell Ranking

panels.description: Wilson 95% confidence intervals with point estimates, sorted by resolution rate.
panels.title: Resolution Confidence Forest

title: Hypergrid Dynamics
